content.en:
Wow!

The shadow of the Venerable dissipated, and the power of the origin of the universe disappeared.

Seeing that Venerable had completely disappeared, Zhang Ling breathed a sigh of relief.

Although Venerable could not kill him in the universe, he was still too nervous and afraid in the face of Venerable.

Venerable is an existence above the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and he is considered one of the giants in the Tibetan God Organization, and he is just an ant to Venerable, even the family behind him is not in the eyes of Venerable.

"You have to work hard, and the Venerable also said that once the two universes are fused together, the supreme of that universe can also come over. When the time comes, the battle at the supreme level will inevitably be very fierce. I've heard before that universe is very powerful, not only are there many first-class supremes, but there are even more than one earth supreme powerhouse who surpasses the first-class supreme and is comparable to the god generals in the chaos!"

Zhang Ling sighed.

He is also a god general in the chaos, but he is only a one-star god general!

In Chaos, the combat power of the Earth Venerable is divided into ten stars, the first five stars are equivalent to the fifth-class Heavenly Venerable to the first-class Heavenly Venerable, and the last five stars are equivalent to the fifth-class Supreme to the first-class Supreme.

And some of the best can break the limit and be promoted to another level of combat power, which is the god general.

Chaos has countless inheritances and countless treasures, and it is not difficult to become a god general, but most of them can only reach a one-star god general in their life, such as him, no matter how much he improves, it is difficult to be promoted to a two-star god general.

But in the universe, it would be too difficult to improve one's strength to a two-star god general!

"In the universe, if it is a rebel, the strength will be raised to one star, and the god will even have a hope of transcending it. If it is not a person who rebels against the sky, he must raise his strength to a three-star god general, and there must be an outside powerful person to pay a certain price to help him transcend!"

This is a secret, a secret that few people know, but the Venerable of the Tibetan God Organization informed them of these reincarnations, but this part of the content has made a vow, and there is no way to leak it.

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others are really ridiculous, they are basically not anti-heavens, although the origin of the universe has been suppressed, they must also raise their strength to a three-star god general before they can hope to transcend. Hehe, they still think that it is easy to detach! A group of guys who have evaded the great destruction of the universe by relying on the secret technique of the Supreme Lord, the improvement of their strength is already limited, and they are almost hopeless to transcend in their lifetime! If the two universes are completely fused and promoted to the great universe, even if they are three or four star god generals, don't even think of transcendence!"

Zhang Ling thought to himself.

There are very few great universes in the chaos, once promoted to the great universe, the origin of the universe will be more powerful, and even the Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouse can be born, but once it is forcibly promoted to the Heavenly Mandate Realm in the universe, it will not be qualified to transcend.

The transcendent is not the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but the cultivation of the Earth Venerable Realm to break the shackles of the universe, a level between the Heavenly Mandate Realm and the Earth Venerable Realm, once they leave the universe, they will be infused with the power of the Chaos Origin, change their potential and cultivation qualifications, and even cast a supreme foundation, with almost unlimited potential.

This is the true secret of the transcendent!

And the Great Universe was born with the Heavenly Destiny Realm fusion, but it is even more difficult to transcend!

For example, the three-star god will be able to transcend from the ordinary universe, but he will not be able to transcend from the great universe, so the promotion of the universe to the great universe is undoubtedly a disaster for many people who can transcend.

Thus.

These reincarnated beings can only choose to transcend any one of the universes before the dual universes are completely integrated, otherwise when the dual universes are completely integrated, there will be no way to transcend.

Of course.

At that time, they could choose to break through to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and then leave the universe and return to the Tibetan God Organization.

The only good thing about the Great Universe is that it is easier to break through the Heavenly Mandate Realm than the outside world, and some Heavenly Mandate Realms in the outside world can enter the Great Universe at some cost.

Because the great universe is extremely strong, I am not afraid of outsiders destroying the great universe.

And the ordinary universe is afraid of the outside world powerhouses or some chaotic beings who specialize in devouring the universe to attack the universe, so they instinctively resist the outside world.

"My goal is to transcend from the ordinary universe, from the big universe? hehe, that's not realistic. Although the number of chaotic universes is not much, it is not very small. There are so many universes, and there are few transcendents for a long time. Anyone who has detached from the Great Universe has long since grown to the point where Ling Zun can only look up to it! Such an existence is a hegemon in the chaos, and it is difficult to give birth to one for hundreds of millions of years, how can we little minions have the potential to transcend from the Great Universe!"

Zhang Ling said secretly.

In addition, the probability of ordinary universes merging into a large universe is also very low, not even one percent, and it is clear that the fusion universe plan is prohibited in Chaos, and once it is discovered, the Hidden God Organization will be severely punished.

Because of this, the Tibetan God Organization secretly carried out this plan.

The reason why it is forbidden is because once the fusion of the two universes fails, the two universes will disappear completely, and there will be no more these two universes in the future.

The universe is very important in the midst of chaos, because the transcendent is born from the universe, and if there is no universe, where is the transcendent?

The forces of the transcendents in the chaos are also very powerful, so those who dare to take the risk of merging with the forces of the universe will be punished by the forces of the transcendents.

But the Great Universe is too important for a force, and if the Tibetan God Organization is in charge of a Great Universe, it can cultivate a large number of geniuses in the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

The Great Universe is the true purpose of the Tibetan God Organization!

Of course, even if it can't be fused into a large universe and the plan fails, as long as a few or one transcendent person are born, it will be earned!

Swish!

Zhang Ling returned to the main space of the universe and continued to lurk.

In the days that followed, one reincarnation after another broke through to the Heavenly Venerable Realm, some of them quickly possessed the strength of a second-rank supreme, while others were still at the strength of a third-rank supreme.

But no matter what their strength is, at the moment when the two universes do not collide and merge, they will not confront the supremes of this universe, which is also the explanation of the supreme.

Time passed little by little -

In the blink of an eye, it's another 30,000 years!

Terran, Heavenly Pavilion.

Today's human race is already seventy supremes, and there are three third-class supremes, namely the Mixed Yuan Supreme, the Kunwu Supreme, and the Divine Blade Supreme.

And Ye Tian's strength has also greatly improved!

Now, he has practiced all the sixth and seventh forms of Tiangang's combat method, leaving only the final eighth and ninth forms.

His physical body has been tempered many times again, and it is more powerful than it was 30,000 years ago, and the divine power has also accumulated to a limit, and it is beginning to compress the divine power, which is also a way for the Supreme Beings to slowly improve their strength in the later stage.

As for the fourth form of the Hunyuan system and the fourth form of the Heavenly Sword system, Ye Tian currently only has a prototype, and if he wants to create it, he still needs to learn more classics and more time.

"The two universes should start colliding, and the entrance to the collision is not on the Terran side!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Once the collision entrance is on the Terran side, then this area will instantly turn into ashes, and countless ordinary humans of the Terran will not be able to withstand that kind of shock wave, and will be annihilated in an instant.

This is not the scene he wants to see!

this day.

A depressing aura was born in the universe, and even the origin of the universe transmitted a strange aura.

All the Supremes know very well that another universe is coming!
